title: AWS Marketplace: Inadev Professional Services
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
Inadev Professional Services
Info
Sold by: Inadev
Inadev delivers cloud, AI, and digital transformation services to federal agencies and enterprises on AWS. From assessments to managed services, we accelerate modernization with secure, scalable, and outcome-driven solutions.
Request private offer
Overview
Pricing
Legal
Support
Overview
Try agent mode
Create proposal
Ask question
Inadev is a multinational technology firm with over a decade of experience delivering digital transformation to federal agencies, commercial enterprises, non-profits, and state and local governments. Our services span AWS cloud strategy and security, CI/CD modernization, DevOps, human-centered design, digital engineering, and systems integration. We combine deep AWS expertise with proven delivery methodologies to help organizations migrate, modernize, and operate mission-critical workloads on AWS services. As an AWS Advanced Tier Services Partner with multiple AWS Competency certifications, Inadev brings validated technical depth and a trusted delivery record to every engagement.
Our data and AI practice helps organizations unlock the full value of their data on AWS. We design and implement unified data ecosystems, build predictive analytics pipelines, and deploy enterprise-grade AI solutions using AWS services. Our proprietary Ceebit Agentic AI accelerator, available on AWS Marketplace, reduces repetitive development tasks, accelerates AI deployment timelines, and provides end-to-end data protection for enterprise AI workloads. For clients facing fraud risk or identity challenges, our ML-based fraud detection and identity intelligence capabilities deliver measurable reductions in exposure and operational burden.
Inadev serves some of the most complex and compliance-sensitive organizations in the United States, including USCIS, NOAA, the IRS, and the U.S. Census Bureau. Our clients benefit from streamlined IT operations, accelerated time to market, and quantifiable mission outcomes. We hold CMMI Level 3 (U.S.) and CMMI Level 5 (India) appraisals, MBE certification, and federal contract vehicles including GSA OASIS+, GSA Polaris, 8(a) STARS III, and MDA SHIELD, making us uniquely positioned to serve both federal and commercial buyers at enterprise scale.
Highlights
AWS Advanced Tier Services Partner with Competency certifications and a proven delivery record across USCIS, NOAA, IRS, and the U.S. Census Bureau — bringing validated AWS expertise and federal-grade rigor to every cloud and AI engagement.
CMMI Level 3 (U.S.) and Level 5 (India) appraised, with federal contract vehicles including GSA OASIS+, GSA Polaris, and 8(a) STARS III — enabling streamlined procurement for federal agencies and compliance-sensitive enterprises.

Support
Vendor support
Inadev provides dedicated support throughout every engagement, from initial assessment through implementation and ongoing managed services. Buyers can reach the Inadev support team directly at support@inadev.com for inquiries related to scoping, active engagements, or technical assistance. Inadev's delivery teams are structured to provide responsive, accountable service aligned to client mission timelines and compliance requirements.
